stemHtml: What is the primary function of a "stick shaker" device in an aircraft's cockpit?

options.a: To shake the control wheel to alert the pilot of a stall condition.
options.b: To vibrate the control column to warn the pilot of the onset of stall.
options.c: To emit a loud sound to indicate a stall condition.
options.d: To provide visual indicators on the instrument panel for stall awareness.
